archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Organic Warmth for Trust

brand_identity.name: WeHA (We Help Automate)
brand_identity.tagline: Automate Without Getting Fined, Banned, or Struck Off.

primary.name: Instrument Serif
primary.usage: Headings (H1, H2, H3), large numbers, editorial callouts. Often used in italic for emphasis.

secondary.name: General Sans
secondary.usage: Body text, labels, buttons, navigation, small metadata.

typography.alignment: Left-aligned primarily to establish authority and function. Center only for the hero typography over 3D scenes.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Optical Alignment, The Bento Grid.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Grid with 1px borders, mixing wide spans (col-span-8) and tall spans (row-span-2). Use for the 'Verticals' and 'How It Works' sections.

threejs_architecture.constraint: RAW three.js ONLY. Do not use react-three-fiber or @react-three/drei.
threejs_architecture.concept: The Living Compliance Network. A scroll-driven 3D choreography where the camera moves through a network of floating technology nodes connected by pulsing data streams.

technical_setup.renderer: A single fixed full-screen <canvas> managed by a ThreeJS class singleton or a single React useEffect. Content layers (HTML) scroll over it using position: absolute/relative and pointer-events: none (except interactive areas).
technical_setup.camera: PerspectiveCamera driven by GSAP ScrollTrigger. As the user scrolls down the page, the camera progresses along a CatmullRomCurve3 path.
technical_setup.nodes_material: MeshPhysicalMaterial for a frosted glass look (transmission: 1, roughness: 0.2, thickness: 0.5) to keep it premium and 'Apple-like'.
technical_setup.connections: THREE.Line or thin THREE.TubeGeometry connecting nodes. In light mode, these are subtle dark/gray lines. The active data pulses are represented by the #01696f accent color traveling along the splines.
technical_setup.performance: Use InstancedMesh for background data particles. Enable frustum culling. Avoid heavy shadows; use baked ambient occlusion or simple point lights.

ui_components_and_motion.html_overlay: HTML content (typography, buttons) sits in a scrollable div layered on top of the fixed Three.js canvas. Use Framer Motion for text reveals (SplitText effect: opacity and Y translation) triggered on scroll.
ui_components_and_motion.buttons: Magnetic effect on hover (Framer Motion). Solid background (#01696f) with white text, or outline variants. Use rounded-full for a premium aerodynamic feel.
ui_components_and_motion.cursor: Custom magnetic dot cursor that snaps to interactive elements, snapping into a larger translucent circle on hover.
ui_components_and_motion.scroll: MUST use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. This is critical for synchronizing the GSAP ScrollTrigger camera movements without jitter.
ui_components_and_motion.cards: Glassmorphism for surfaces floating over 3D. backdrop-blur-xl, subtle 1px inner border, 0px border-radius (sharp) or slight 8px radius.

Home.hero: Center text 'Automate Without Getting Fined.' 3D Network is heavily clustered in the background, rotating slowly. Nodes: n8n, Make, Claude.
Home.how_it_works: 3-step scroll. Camera dives into the network. Text updates in the foreground HTML layer while 3D nodes re-arrange into a pipeline.
Home.verticals: Bento grid overlay. 3D camera pans left/right looking at different 'sectors' of the data web.
Home.compliance_differentiator: Dark mode moment. The background temporarily shifts to dark (#171614), showcasing a 'secure vault' node glowing in accent teal.
Home.contact: Form overlaid on a calm, slow-moving abstract 3D water/glass wave.

page_blueprints.Services: Focus on the Hermes agent and AI capabilities. 3D features a massive central glowing 'Brain/Agent' node.
page_blueprints.Work: Case studies. Before/After flow diagrams implemented as 2D/3D hybrid nodes. Camera moves from a messy 'spaghetti' network (Before) to a highly organized, linear data flow (After).
page_blueprints.About: Founder story. 3D transitions to a macro close-up of a single 'Shield' or 'Lock' geometry, symbolizing IAM/cybersecurity roots.
page_blueprints.Contact: Audit request form. Clean, split layout. 3D canvas is minimal on the right side.

tech_stack_icons.note: Use simple-icons or lucide-react in the frontend implementation. For Three.js, map these SVG URLs to canvas textures or use HTML overlays attached to 3D coordinates via THREE.Vector3.project.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Use kebab-case and role-based naming.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Three.js, GSAP, and Lenis for the core engine.
Create a singleton WebGL class or highly optimized React component for the raw three.js canvas. It must sit at z-index: -1.
Implement a ScrollTrigger that maps window.scrollY to the Three.js camera position.
Ensure the HTML layer has pointer-events: none, but interactive elements (buttons, links) have pointer-events: auto.
Apply Instrument Serif for all headings and General Sans for body.
Build a custom cursor component that tracks mouse position and uses Framer Motion for magnetic hover states.
Inject the SVGs directly onto HTML nodes that track 3D space, or bake them into textures for the 3D planes to maintain the Apple-like floating tech stack feel.
